Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 17828 -Force; Start-Sleep 1; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_-Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p.get\(''''id''''\), p.get\(''''name''''\), p.get\(''''provider''''\), p.get\(''''baseURL''''\), p.get\(''''model''''\), bool\(p.get\(''''apiKey''''\)\)\) for p in d]")
